formulas.gross_operating_cash_flow: gross operating cash flow = sum of investment attributable operating cash flows before fund-level fees
formulas.net_operating_cash_flow: net operating cash flow = gross operating cash flow - management fees - fund expenses
formulas.gross_irr: gross IRR = XIRR(capital calls, distributions, terminal ending NAV)
formulas.net_irr: net IRR = XIRR(capital calls, distributions, fee and expense deductions, terminal ending NAV)

provenance.notes: Aggregated operating cash flow and attributable NAV

bridge_items.label: Gross operating cash flow
bridge_items.formula: gross operating cash flow = sum of investment attributable operating cash flows before fund-level fees

bridge_items.label: Management fees
bridge_items.formula: management fees = latest released fee accrual row for the quarter

bridge_items.label: Fund expenses
bridge_items.formula: fund expenses = sum of latest expense rows per expense_type for the quarter

bridge_items.label: Net operating cash flow
bridge_items.formula: net operating cash flow = gross operating cash flow - management fees - fund expenses
